## Source: amazon-inspector (2dd7a47296a1be165b33bf8cc140bf4b6b004025557cfb22a0b75c4ec8eea864)
The package @modals/layout was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (423ea5070da3529e74e772e47cd0109f3dfc4a483645bfd0537e9007bd9ec60d)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@modals/layout' @ 99999.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
